summary_en: 5,000,000 shares (4.57% of shares outstanding), ¥35.0B upper limit, open-market purchase via Tokyo Stock Exchange, May 15, 2026 – March 31, 2027. Rationale: capital efficiency and flexible capital policy execution.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Terms and Conditions for Treasury Stock Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Kurita Water Industries resolved on May 14, 2026 to acquire treasury stock under Article 156 of the Companies Act. The company will acquire up to 5,000,000 ordinary shares (4.57% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) at a maximum aggregate cost of ¥35.0 billion via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between May 15, 2026 and March 31, 2027. The stated purpose is to execute flexible capital policy in response to management conditions and improve capital efficiency. The company intends to consider cancellation of treasury shares, including those acquired in this program, for which no future use is anticipated.
